definition:
μετ-άγω 
 [in LXX: 3Ki.8:47-48, 2Ch.6:37 (שָׁבָה) 2Ch.36:3 (סוּר hi.), 1Es.1:45 Est.2:10 Est.5:69, Est.8:17, Sir prol.16 Sir.10:8, 2Ma.1:33 * ;] 
  1. in Xen., Plut., and later writers, to transfer, transport (so LXX). 
   2. In sense other­wise unknown (see Hort, in l), to turn about, direct: Jas.3:3-4.†
 (AS)
